name: C# Data Dev
initializeCommand:
sh -c '\
    set -e; \
    NETWORK=backend; \
    if ! docker network inspect "$NETWORK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
      echo "[devcontainer] Creating Docker network: $NETWORK"; \
      docker network create --driver bridge "$NETWORK"; \
    else \
      echo "[devcontainer] Docker network already exists: $NETWORK"; \
    fi\
  '
